questiontext.text:
Create the following users (default authentication method):
| user | host | password | | ---- | ---- | -------- | | `andy` | `%` | `pazzw0Rd` | | `ben` | `%` | `pazzw0Rd` | | `collin` | `%` | `pazzw0Rd` | | `danny` | `%` | `pazzw0Rd` |

expected.text:
Dump from 'mysql.user':
User Host plugin 1 andy % caching_sha2_password 2 ben % caching_sha2_password 3 collin % caching_sha2_password 4 danny % caching_sha2_password
Checking users connection:
+---------+ | andy: | +---------+ | success | +---------+
+---------+ | ben: | +---------+ | success | +---------+
+---------+ | collin: | +---------+ | success | +---------+
+---------+ | danny: | +---------+ | success | +---------+

extra.text:
invoke_cursor_sql(__student_answer__, database=None)
__sql_verify__ = """ SELECT User, Host, plugin FROM mysql.user WHERE User IN ('andy', 'ben', 'collin', 'danny') AND Host = '%'; """ print("Dump from 'mysql.user':\n") print(invoke_cursor_sql(__sql_verify__, database=None))
print("\nChecking users connection:\n")
CFG['password'] = 'pazzw0Rd'
clt = ['--user=andy' if x == '--user=root' else x for x in COMMAND_LINE_TOOL] print(invoke_commandline_sql("SELECT 'success' AS 'andy:';", database=None, command_line_tool=clt))
clt = ['--user=ben' if x == '--user=root' else x for x in COMMAND_LINE_TOOL] print(invoke_commandline_sql("SELECT 'success' AS 'ben:';", database=None, command_line_tool=clt))
clt = ['--user=collin' if x == '--user=root' else x for x in COMMAND_LINE_TOOL] print(invoke_commandline_sql("SELECT 'success' AS 'collin:';", database=None, command_line_tool=clt))
clt = ['--user=danny' if x == '--user=root' else x for x in COMMAND_LINE_TOOL] print(invoke_commandline_sql("SELECT 'success' AS 'danny:';", database=None, command_line_tool=clt))

name.text: 02 - GRANT table privileges to a user

questiontext.text: Grant user `andy@%` privileges for `SELECT`, `DROP`, and `INSERT` operations on the `animals` table in the `smart_data` database.

expected.text: User Host Db Table_name Select Drop Insert 1 andy % smart_data animals true true true

name.text: 03 - REVOKE table privilege from a user

questiontext.text: Revoke the `INSERT` privilege on the `animals` table in the `smart_data` database from user `andy@%`.

expected.text: User Host Db Table_name Select Drop Insert 1 andy % smart_data animals true true false

Dump from 'mysql.user':
User Host plugin 1 andy % caching_sha2_password 2 collin % caching_sha2_password 3 danny % caching_sha2_password

questiontext.text:
Create the following roles with the following privileges:
| role name | object | privileges | | --------- | ------ | ---------- | | `read_all` | `bank` table, all columns | SELECT rows | | `write_all` | `bank` table, all columns | INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE rows | | `read_rodo` | `bank` table, columns `id`, `surname`, `address` | SELECT rows | | `read_view_rodo` | `personal_data` view, all columns | SELECT rows |

expected.text:
Tables/views privileges:
Role Host Db Table/view Select Insert Update Delete 1 read_all % smart_data bank true false false false 2 read_rodo % smart_data bank false false false false 3 write_all % smart_data bank false true true true 4 read_view_rodo % smart_data personal_data true false false false
Columns privileges:
Role Host Db Table/view Column_name Select Insert Update Delete 1 read_rodo % smart_data bank address true false false false 2 read_rodo % smart_data bank id true false false false 3 read_rodo % smart_data bank surname true false false false

questiontext.text:
Assign the following roles to users:
| user | roles | | ---- | ----- | | `andy@%` | `read_rodo` | | `collin@%` | `read_all`, `write_all` | | `danny@%` | `read_view_rodo` |

expected.text:
User roles:
User Role 1 andy@% read_rodo@% 2 collin@% read_all@% 3 collin@% write_all@% 4 danny@% read_view_rodo@%

name.text: 07 - revoke a role from a user

questiontext.text: Revoke the `read_all` role from user `collin@%` and display the roles currently assigned to them.

question.answer:
REVOKE read_all FROM 'collin'@'%';
SELECT CONCAT(TO_USER, '@', TO_HOST) AS User, CONCAT(FROM_USER, '@', FROM_HOST) AS Role FROM mysql.role_edges WHERE TO_USER = 'collin' AND TO_Host = '%' ORDER BY Role;

questiontext.text: Grant user `andy@%` `SELECT` privilege only on the `id` and `surname` columns of the `bank` table in the `smart_data` database.

name.text: 09 - mysqlpump: backup table data using wildcard

questiontext.text: Use `mysqlpump` to create a backup of the data stored in tables in the `academy` database whose names start with `ye` (use wildcard characters).
Use `mysqlpump` to create a backup of the `CREATE USER` and `GRANT` statements for user `kyle`.
